rulings.Case Title: JULLIEN VS LITTEN
rulings.Rulings: RE GRIFFIN - DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION NONPAYMENT OF WAGES AND OVERTIME OVERRULED. 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: JULLIEN VS LITTEN
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO JOE LITTEN SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FALSE PROMISE AND & 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SET FORTH DATES OF FALSE PROMISE OR MISREPRESENTATION AND KNOWLEDGE OF FALSITY. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT. DEMURRER OVERRULED 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION ORAL CONTRACT - CAUSE OF ACTION NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BECAUSE POTENTIAL APPLICABILITY OF RELATION BACK DOCTRINE. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. (NR)
